# libhangul galmadeuli golden v1 kbd=2n9256 (do not edit by hand)
## new_ok=1
## singles
T s_21
  k=0x21 p=1 commit=U+0021 pre=(empty)
  flush=(empty)

  flush=U+3163

  flush=(empty)

  k=0x29 p=1 commit=U+0029 pre=(empty)
  flush=(empty)
## vowels

  k=0x68 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B85C
  k=0x6B p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B8B0
  flush=U+B8B0

T yae
  k=0x72 p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+3139
  k=0x6D p=1 commit=(empty) pre=U+B7B4
  k=0x6C p=1 commit=U+B7B4 pre=U+3161
  flush=U+3161
## backspace
T bs_kka
  built pre=U+3163
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
T bs_salm
  built pre=U+D78D
  bs r=1 pre=U+D78C
  bs r=1 pre=U+D788
  bs r=1 pre=U+314E
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
T bs_gwa
  built pre=U+B8B0
  bs r=1 pre=U+B85C
  bs r=1 pre=U+3139
  bs r=1 pre=(empty)
## reset
T rs_1
  afterreset pre=(empty) empty=1
  flush=U+AE30
T rs_2
  afterreset pre=(empty) empty=1
  flush=U+B2E4
# end
